case_title: QUAN THE LY AS GUARDIAN FOR PLAINTIFF ANDREW HUA VS BAILEY, ALBAN ODANIEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY QUAN THE LY AS GUARDIAN FOR PLAINTIFF ANDREW HUA AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, ALBAN ODANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUAN THE LY AS GUARDIAN FOR PLAINTIFF ANDREW HUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAILEY, ALBAN ODANIEL $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,810.00, PROCEED TO BE KEPT IN A BLOCKED ACCOUNT UNTIL ANDREW HUA REACHES AGE 18. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BAILEY, ALBAN ODANIEL
